subject: Product Management
title: Outcome-Driven Innovation
description: A fast breakdown of Outcome-Driven Innovation for builders.

hook.text: Tony Ulwick took Jobs to Be Done and made it measurable — turning customer needs into quantifiable outcomes.

buildup.text: His framework maps every desired outcome: 'minimize the time it takes to find the right product online.'

discovery.text: Teams survey customers on importance and satisfaction for each outcome. Gaps reveal underserved needs.

twist.text: The biggest opportunities aren't where satisfaction is low — they're where importance is high and satisfaction is low.

climax.text: Ulwick claims his method has an 86% innovation success rate, compared to the industry average of 17%.

punchline.text: Measure what customers need. Build where the gaps are.

quiz.question: How does Outcome-Driven Innovation identify opportunities?
options: By finding outcomes where importance is high but satisfaction is low
By asking customers what features they want
